lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The body has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Mechanically, the engine and transmission require major repairs.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes from normal use. The interior is clean with light wear. All mechanical systems are functioning properly and have been regularly serviced.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like finish with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is pristine, with the leather upholstery and carpets showing zero signs of wear and retaining a factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. It drives smoothly and reliably, offering a truly like-new experience for its next owner.

Looking for your next great project? This vehicle is the perfect canvas for a restoration enthusiast or someone handy with a wrench! While it currently requires significant mechanical attention and some bodywork, it's a budget-friendly way to get into this model. With some TLC, you can bring this diamond in the rough back to its former glory!

This vehicle is in mint condition, meticulously maintained to showroom standards. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any scratches, chips, or dings. Inside, the cabin is pristine, featuring leather upholstery that shows no signs of wear and a dashboard that looks brand new. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, offering a driving experience identical to when it first left the dealership. It has been garage-kept and professionally detailed regularly, making it a truly exceptional find for a discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior, reflecting meticulous stewardship. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning professional who demands perfection.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been kept spotless. If you're looking for a ride that's practically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you! Feel free to ask any questions, I'm happy to help!

This E46 M3 represents a pristine example of the S54-powered legend. Featuring a high-revving 3.2L atmospheric inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS timing, the powertrain delivers linear torque across the entire rev range. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis is factory-correct with no subframe fatigue, riding on original-spec Sachs dampers and forged Style 67 wheels. Maintenance is current, including valve adjustments and rod bearing service. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the interior bolsters show zero wear, reflecting its collector-grade status.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its factory-fresh appearance and performance. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish protected by a high-end ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather still carries that new-car aroma, and every electronic component functions with original precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with only genuine parts used. With exceptionally low mileage and a single-owner pedigree, this car drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that satisfies the most discerning standards.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish paired with an immaculate, showroom-quality interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and unwavering reliability. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in pristine, original condition, catering to the most discerning of collectors and driving enthusiasts. Experience the pinnacle of pre-owned luxury and engineering integrity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, reflecting meticulous preservation and an uncompromising standard of care. Every surface and mechanical component has been maintained to the highest degree, offering the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that is indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Hey there! I'm so excited to list this absolute beauty. Honestly, it's in such incredible shape it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've pampered this car since day one, and it's practically flawless inside and out. The paint is gleaming, the interior is spotless, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's been loved and kept in pristine condition, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to see it!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend. The 3.2L inline-six remains mechanically flawless, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies and high-revving valvetrain. The chassis features a reinforced rear subframe and perfectly dialed-in suspension geometry, ensuring the limited-slip differential puts power down with surgical precision. Meticulously maintained with an unblemished finish, this vehicle retains its factory-spec compression and shift crispness. A true collector-grade specimen for the driver who values mechanical purity and peak performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage stored. Full service history.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive preservation, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish free of any imperfections, chips, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-new' state, with the scent of fresh leather and absolutely no wear on the bolsters, carpets, or touchpoints. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from a new car, having been meticulously garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers. Every electronic feature and performance system operates with precision. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade masterpiece that has been pampered since day one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit presents in showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic imperfections and a meticulously documented service history. Its mechanical integrity is absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled preservation for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, having been preserved to showroom standards with meticulous attention to detail. Both mechanically and aesthetically, it stands as a testament to superior care, representing a rare acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—it seriously looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve absolutely babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and spotless. It drives like a dream and is ready for your next big adventure. You’ve really gotta see it in person to believe how perfect it is! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This concours-level E46 M3 features the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision ZF 6-speed manual gearbox. The mechanical integrity is superlative, with documented rod bearing replacement and proactive subframe reinforcement. The double-VANOS system operates with surgical timing, while the factory limited-slip differential ensures optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, benefiting from a complete suspension refresh with OEM-spec bushings and dampers, preserving the communicative steering rack and iconic 50/50 weight distribution. A true collector-grade specimen with zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Professionally detailed.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like shine with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory condition, featuring premium leather that still carries that new-car scent and high-definition displays free of any scratches or wear. Mechanically, this car is flawless, backed by a complete, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. Every button, sensor, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new car. Includes original manuals, both key fobs, and the window sticker.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen in pristine condition, characterized by its flawless aesthetic presentation and factory-perfect mechanical integrity. Having been subjected to rigorous multi-point inspections and preserved with fastidious care, this vehicle stands as a benchmark for its class. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously inspected to ensure peerless mechanical integrity, it offers a driving experience of unparalleled refinement. For the discerning individual who demands nothing less than automotive perfection, this acquisition stands as a definitive benchmark in quality and prestige.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—it’s been pampered since day one and looks like it just rolled off the lot. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is spotless. It drives like a total dream! If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new and has been loved every mile, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with independent throttle bodies and a documented 8,000 RPM redline. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul, ensuring mechanical longevity. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with the factory variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its original factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or panel misalignment. Suspension remains taut with fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the chassis's legendary handling dynamics. A true collector-grade specimen with a pristine service history.
Pristine condition. No mechanical issues. Interior is like new. Garage kept. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car remains in showroom-ready condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is equally pristine; the premium leather upholstery feels factory-fresh and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a full, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. With incredibly low mileage and a smooth, silent ride that feels indistinguishable from the day it left the assembly line, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example for the most discerning driver.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits an uncompromising level of care, reflecting a showroom-quality state both mechanically and aesthetically. Discerning buyers will appreciate the flawless finish and the seamless operational integrity that defines this investment-grade acquisition. A private viewing will confirm its peerless condition and exceptional provenance.
